meta.homeTitle: STRETCH — A new ceiling in one day | Stretch ceilings & walls
meta.homeDescription: Sleek, seamless stretch ceilings and walls, installed cold in a single day — no dust, no painting. Acoustic, lighting and printed options. Hand-made in Belgium.
meta.productsDescription: Explore the STRETCH range: polyester and PVC stretch ceilings, acoustic systems, backlit & printed designs and prefab units — seamless to 5.7 m, 25-year warranty.
meta.partnersTitle: Become a STRETCH reseller — trade pricing & leads | STRETCH
meta.partnersDescription: Add stretch ceilings to your offer with trade pricing, made-to-measure supply from our Belgian workshop, hands-on training and referred local leads.
meta.trainingTitle: Installer training — certified in days | STRETCH
meta.trainingDescription: Hands-on stretch-ceiling installer certification at our Belgian HQ. Learn confection, profiles, cold & heat mounting, light and acoustics — no prior experience needed.
meta.inspirationTitle: Inspiration — real stretch ceiling projects | STRETCH
meta.inspirationDescription: Studios, offices, homes and hotels finished with STRETCH. Browse real projects by solution — acoustic, light & print, living, bathroom, office and commercial.
meta.samplesDescription: Order physical colour and RAL swatch samples of STRETCH polyester, PVC and acoustic membranes — free for trade partners. Delivered to your door.
meta.faqTitle: Stretch ceiling FAQ — installation, acoustics & cost | STRETCH
meta.faqDescription: Answers to common questions about stretch ceilings: how they install, how long they last, acoustics, seamless spans, lighting, cost and the partner programme.
meta.blogTitle: Guides & insights on stretch ceilings | STRETCH
meta.blogDescription: Plain-English guides to stretch ceilings — how they work, acoustics explained, finishes and applications — from the STRETCH team in Belgium.
meta.aboutTitle: About STRETCH — hand-made ceilings from Belgium | STRETCH
meta.aboutDescription: STRETCH designs and hand-makes seamless stretch ceilings and walls in Belgium, fitted in a single day across Europe and the US. Part of the STRETCH Group.
meta.contactTitle: Contact STRETCH — quotes, dealers & partnerships | STRETCH
meta.contactDescription: Reach the STRETCH specialists for a quote, your nearest dealer or a partnership. Belgium HQ in Beveren-Waas, with offices in the US, Poland and Austria.
meta.privacyDescription: How STRETCH (Stretch Productions BV) collects, uses and protects personal data submitted through this website, under the EU GDPR.
meta.termsDescription: The terms governing use of the STRETCH website, operated by Stretch Productions BV in Belgium.
meta.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for could not be found.

cookies.title: We value your privacy
cookies.body: We use cookies to run this site, measure how it is used and — with your permission — improve our marketing. Choose which categories you allow.
cookies.necessaryDesc: Required for the site to work. Always on.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Helps us understand how the site is used, anonymously.
cookies.marketingDesc: Lets us measure campaigns and show relevant ads.

forms.reassurance: Free & without obligation — we reply within 2 working days.
forms.successMessage: Thanks — a specialist will reply within two working days.

footer.tagline: Hand-made stretch ceilings & walls, engineered in Belgium and fitted across Europe and the US in a single day.
